memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Thomas Hervey Bio
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas Hervey-5 of Thurleigh in Bedfordshire(2) and originally of Ickworth, Suffolk(4) was born circa 1440(2) or ca. 1431(4), the second son of John Hervey-4 of Thurleigh and his wife Joan Paston.(2) …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Harvey於1431年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利時，他的父親John Harvey26歲，母親Joan Niernuyt23歲。他於1451年與Jane Drury在英國素福爾可易可沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1477年在英國英格蘭素福爾可易可沃斯享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易可沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Harvey于1431年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利时，他的父亲John Harvey26岁，母亲Joan Niernuyt23岁。他于1451年与Jane Drury在英国素福爾可易可沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1477年在英国英格兰素福爾可易可沃斯享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易可沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Harvey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herve
meanings: Breton (Hervé): from the Old Breton personal name Hoiearnviu, composed of the elements hoiarn ‘iron’ and viu ‘blazing’, or Hærviu, with the first element meaning ‘battle’ or ‘fort’.
French (Hervé): from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariwig, composed of the elements hari ‘army’ and wig ‘battle’. Compare Harvey .

variants.name: Hervey
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Havey
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Harvey  , although some instances in the historical records may be spelling errors.

variants.name: Harvison
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): patronymic from the personal name   Harvey   + ‘son’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Harvey was born in 1431, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Harvey, was 26 and his mother, Joan Niernuyt, was 23. He married Jane Drury in 1451, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1477, in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Harvey est né en 1431, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Harvey, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Niernuyt, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jane Drury en 1451, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1477, à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Ickworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Harvey 1431 in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Harvey 26 und seine Mutter Joan Niernuyt 23. Er hat 1451 in Ickworth, Suffolk, England Jane Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1477 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ickworth, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Jane Drury nel 1451, nel Ickworth, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1477, nel Ickworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Ickworth, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Harvey(이)가 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Harvey(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Niernuyt(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1451년 영국 수폴크 이ck워스에서 Jane Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이ck워스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이ck워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Harvey nasceu em 1431, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Harvey, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Niernuyt, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Drury em 1451, em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1477, em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Harvey родился в 1431 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Harvey было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Niernuyt, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Drury в 1451 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1477 г. в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности иккворт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Jane Drury en 1451, en Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1477, en Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Ickworth, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
